title: Wood Carvings
description:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

options.title: Snake
options.requires: None of your cards can be Enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple].

options.title: Torus
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Toric Toughness[/gold].

conditions: Must have at least 1 Basic card in deck that can be removed
notes: After selecting a carving, the statue reacts and you receive a unique description. The Bird choice causes the statue's eyes to light up, the Snake causes the scales to light up, and the Torus causes the statue to transform into a fried pastry. Each option allows you to enhance your deck: Bird and Torus transform a Basic card to a specific card, while Snake enchants a card with [purple]Slither[/purple] (if available).
